properties.query:
AuditLogs
| where Category =~ "RoleManagement"
| where AADOperationType in ("Assign", "AssignEligibleRole", "CreateRequestGrantedRole", "CreateRequestPermanentEligibleRole", "CreateRequestPermanentGrantedRole")
| where ActivityDisplayName has_any ("Add eligible member to role", "Add member to role")
| mv-apply TargetResourceSubject = TargetResources on 
    (
    where TargetResourceSubject.type in~ ("User", "ServicePrincipal")
    | extend
        Target = iff(TargetResourceSubject.type =~ "ServicePrincipal", tostring(TargetResourceSubject.displayName), tostring(TargetResourceSubject.userPrincipalName)),
        subjectProps = TargetResourceSubject.modifiedProperties
    )
| mv-apply TargetResourceRole = TargetResources on 
    (
    // mimic modifiedProperties so we can use the same logic to get the role name regardless of where it comes from
    where TargetResourceRole.type in~ ("Role")
    | extend roleProps = pack_array(bag_pack("displayName", "Role.DisplayName", "newValue", TargetResourceRole.displayName))
    )
| mv-apply Property = iff(array_length(subjectProps) > 0, subjectProps, roleProps) on 
    ( 
    where Property.displayName =~ "Role.DisplayName"
    | extend RoleName = trim('"', tostring(Property.newValue))
    )
| where RoleName contains "Admin"
| extend InitiatingAppName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalId)
| extend InitiatingUserPrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatingAadUserId = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
| extend InitiatingIpAddress = tostring(iff(isnotempty(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress), InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress, InitiatedBy.app.ipAddress))
| extend Initiator = iif(isnotempty(InitiatingAppName), InitiatingAppName, InitiatingUserPrincipalName)
// Comment below to alert for PIM activations
| where Initiator != "MS-PIM"
| summarize
    by
    bin(TimeGenerated, 1h),
    OperationName,
    RoleName,
    Target,
    Initiator,
    InitiatingUserPrincipalName,
    InitiatingAadUserId,
    InitiatingAppName,
    InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId,
    InitiatingIpAddress,
    Result,
    AADTenantId
| extend
    TargetName = tostring(split(Target, '@', 0)[0]),
    TargetUPNSuffix = tostring(split(Target, '@', 1)[0]),
    InitiatorName = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName, '@', 0)[0]),
    InitiatorUPNSuffix = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName, '@', 1)[0])
| extend
    Source_Network_IPLocation= geo_info_from_ip_address(InitiatingIpAddress),
    ActivityType=OperationName
| project
        Alert_Category_zh = "Entra ID",
    Alert_SubCategory_zh = "異常身分權限修改",
    Alert_Name_zh = "使用者指派了特權角色",
    Alert_Description_zh = strcat(
                           "於台灣時間：",
                           format_datetime(datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
                           ",在Entra ID : <TenantId>",
                           ",操作者:",
                           iff(isnotempty(Initiator), Initiator, "<UnknownInitiator>"),
                           ",由 IP:",
                           InitiatingIpAddress,
                           ",指派特權角色 ",
                           tostring(RoleName),
                           " 給使用者 ",
                           iff(isnotempty(Target), Target, "<NoTargetUser>"),
                           ".此行為屬高風險權限異動,需立即確認其合法性。"
                       ),
    Alert_TriageStep_zh = strcat(
                          "1. 確認該特權角色指派是否透過 Entra ID PIM 核准的變更流程執行。",
                          "2. 與操作者:",
                          iff(isnotempty(Initiator), Initiator, "<UnknownInitiator>"),
                          " 確認是否為本人操作。",
                          "3. 檢查來源 IP 與地理位置是否異常或非公司Public IP。"
                      ),
    Alert_Containment_zh = strcat(
                           "1. 若判定為未授權角色指派,立即撤銷目標使用者 ",
                           iff(isnotempty(Target), Target, "<NoTargetUser>"),
                           " 的特權角色(",
                           tostring(RoleName),
                           "),並回復至異動前狀態。",
                           "2. 立即限制或暫停執行角色指派的操作者(使用者或應用程式),撤銷其登入權杖並視需要強制重設 MFA/密碼。 ",
                           "3. 若來源為應用程式(",
                           iff(isnotempty(InitiatingAppName), InitiatingAppName, "<NoServicePrincipal>"),
                           "),立即停用該 Service Principal,撤銷高權限 API 同意與憑證/密鑰。"
                       ),
    Alert_Remediation_zh = strcat(
                           "1. 僅允許透過 Entra ID PIM 進行特權角色存取。",
                           "2. 對角色管理與 PIM 操作強制條件式存取與 MFA 限制僅能從受管理裝置與命名位置執行。",
                           "3. 建立特權角色異動的即時告警與自動化回應(SOAR)即時偵測異常角色指派行為。 "
                       ),
            Alert_Time_TW = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"),
    Alert_Time_UTC0 = TimeGenerated,
    Event_Action = ActivityType,
    Event_Status = Result,
    //Event_Description = ActivityDisplayName,
    Source_Identity_FullName = iff(isnotempty(Initiator), Initiator, InitiatingAppName),
    //Source_Identity_ID = ActorID,
    Source_Identity_Type = iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUserPrincipalName), "User", "Service"),
    Source_Network_IPAddress = InitiatingIpAddress,
    Source_Network_IPLocation = Source_Network_IPLocation,
    //Source_Resource_Name = InitiatingAppName,
    Target_Identity_FullName = Target,
    Target_Identity_DomainType = iff(Target contains "EXT", 'External', 'Internal'),
    Target_Identity_Type = "User",
    Target_Resource_ID = tostring(coalesce(AADTenantId, TenantId)),
    Target_Resource_Type = "Entra ID"

properties.query:
// Define the start and end times based on input values
let starttime = now() - 1h;
let endtime = now();
// Set a lookback period of 14 days
let lookback = starttime - 14d;
// Define a reusable function to query audit logs
let awsFunc = (start: datetime, end: datetime) {
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (start .. end)
    | where Category =~ "RoleManagement"
    | where AADOperationType in ("Assign", "AssignEligibleRole")
    | where ActivityDisplayName has_any ("Add eligible member to role", "Add member to role")
    | mv-apply TargetResource = TargetResources on
        (
        where TargetResource.type in~ ("User", "ServicePrincipal")
        | extend
            Target = iff(TargetResource.type =~ "ServicePrincipal", tostring(TargetResource.displayName), tostring(TargetResource.userPrincipalName)),
            props = TargetResource.modifiedProperties
        )
    | mv-apply Property = props on
        (
        where Property.displayName =~ "Role.DisplayName"
        | extend RoleName = trim('"', tostring(Property.newValue))
        )
    | where RoleName contains "Admin" and Result == "success"
};
// Query for audit events in the current day
let EventInfo_CurrentDay = awsFunc(starttime, endtime);
// Query for audit events in the historical period (lookback)
let EventInfo_historical = awsFunc(lookback, starttime);
// Find unseen events by performing a left anti-join
let EventInfo_Unseen = (EventInfo_CurrentDay
    | join kind=leftanti(EventInfo_historical) on Target, RoleName, OperationName
    );
// Extend and clean up the results
EventInfo_Unseen
| extend InitiatingAppName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalId)
| extend InitiatingUserPrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatingAadUserId = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
| extend InitiatingIpAddress = tostring(iff(isnotempty(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress), InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress, InitiatedBy.app.ipAddress))
| extend Initiator = iif(isnotempty(InitiatingAppName), InitiatingAppName, InitiatingUserPrincipalName)
// You can uncomment the lines below to filter out PIM activations
| where Initiator != "MS-PIM"
//| summarize StartTime=min(TimeGenerated), EndTime=min(TimeGenerated) by OperationName, RoleName, Target, Initiator, Result
// Project specific columns and split them for further analysis
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    OperationName,
    RoleName,
    Target,
    Initiator,
    InitiatingUserPrincipalName,
    InitiatingAadUserId,
    InitiatingAppName,
    InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId,
    InitiatingIpAddress,
    Result,
    AADTenantId
| extend
    TargetName = tostring(split(Target, '@', 0)[0]),
    TargetUPNSuffix = tostring(split(Target, '@', 1)[0]),
    InitiatorName = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName, '@', 0)[0]),
    InitiatorUPNSuffix = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName, '@', 1)[0])
| extend
    Source_Network_IPLocation= geo_info_from_ip_address(InitiatingIpAddress),
    ActivityType=OperationName
| project
        Alert_Category_zh = "Entra ID",
    Alert_SubCategory_zh = "異常身分權限修改",
    Alert_Name_zh = "特權角色分配給新的使用者",
    Alert_Description_zh = strcat(
                           "於台灣時間:",
                           format_datetime(datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
                           ",在Entra ID : <TenantId>",
                           "操作者：",
                           iff(isnotempty(Initiator), Initiator, InitiatingAppName),
                           ",由 IP:",
                           InitiatingIpAddress,
                           ",指派特權角色 ",
                           tostring(RoleName),
                           " 給 ",
                           iff(isnotempty(Target), Target, "<NoTargetUser>"),
                           ".該使用者在近期(14天內)未曾出現的權限異動行為。"
                       ),
    Alert_TriageStep_zh = strcat(
                          "1. 確認該特權角色指派是否透過 Entra ID PIM核准的變更流程執行。",
                          "2. 與操作者:",
                          iff(isnotempty(Initiator), Initiator, "<UnknownInitiator>"),
                          " 確認是否為本人操作。",
                          "3. 檢查來源 IP 與地理位置是否異常或非公司Public IP。"
                      ),
    Alert_Containment_zh = strcat(
                           "1. 若判定為未授權角色指派,立即撤銷目標 ",
                           iff(isnotempty(Target), Target, "<NoTargetUser>"),
                           " 的特權角色(",
                           tostring(RoleName),
                           "),並回復至異動前狀態。",
                           "2. 立即限制執行角色指派的來源身分(使用者或應用程式),撤銷登入權杖,必要時強制重設密碼與 MFA。 ",
                           "3. 若來源為應用程式(",

properties.description: [Entra ID]特權帳戶的驗證方法已更改_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0

識別特權帳戶正在變更的身份驗證方法。這可能表明攻擊者向帳戶添加了身份驗證方法，以便他們可以繼續存取。
1.遏制措施：在 Entra ID ▸ Users ▸ 暫時停用目標管理員帳號；若為緊急帳號（Break-glass），先改密碼並保留最小權限。
2.於使用者頁面 Revoke sessions 此動作會強制失效所有 Refresh Token
3.Entra ID ▸ Authentication methods → 移除新增的 FIDO2、電話、Email 等；並審核 AuditLogs 內的細節確認異常來源。
4.為受害帳號設定隨機高強度密碼、要求下次登入必須 MFA；同時檢查 Security info 只有公司批准的方法。
properties.displayName: [Entra ID] 特權帳戶的驗證方法已更改
properties.query:
let queryperiod = 1d;
let queryfrequency = 1d;
let security_info_actions = dynamic(["User registered security info", "User changed default security info", "User deleted security info", "Admin updated security info", "Admin deleted security info", "Admin registered security info"]);
let VIPUsers = (
    IdentityInfo
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(queryperiod)
    | mv-expand AssignedRoles
    | where AssignedRoles contains 'Admin'
    | summarize by AccountUPN);
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(queryperiod)
| where Category =~ "UserManagement"
| where ActivityDisplayName in (security_info_actions)
| extend Initiator = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend IP = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress)
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalId)
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalName)
| mv-apply TargetResource = TargetResources on 
    (
    where TargetResource.type =~ "User"
    | extend Target = tostring(TargetResource.userPrincipalName)
    )
| where Target in~ (VIPUsers)
// Uncomment the line below if you are experiencing high volumes of Target entities. If this is uncommented, the Target column will not be mapped to an entity.
//| summarize Start=min(TimeGenerated), End=max(TimeGenerated), Actions = make_set(ResultReason, MaxSize=8), Targets=make_set(Target, MaxSize=256) by Initiator, IP, Result
// Comment out this line below, if line above is used.
| summarize
    Start=min(TimeGenerated),
    End=max(TimeGenerated),
    Actions = make_set(ResultReason, MaxSize=8),
    Target_ResourceName = make_set(TargetResources)
    by
    Initiator,
    IP,
    Result,
    Targets = Target,
    InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId,
    InitiatingAppServicePrincipalName,
    bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| mv-expand Actions
| extend
    Action = tostring(Actions),
    InitiatorName = tostring(split(Initiator, '@', 0)[0]), 
    InitiatorUPNSuffix = tostring(split(Initiator, '@', 1)[0]),
    //TargetName = iff(tostring(Targets) has "[", "", tostring(split(Targets, '@', 0)[0])), 
    TargetUPNSuffix = iff(tostring(Targets) has "[", "", tostring(split(Targets, '@', 1)[0]))
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(IP) // <-- Added this line to get Geo Info
| extend Source_Network_IPLocation = tostring(GeoInfo.country)  
| project
        Alert_Category_zh = "Entra ID",
    Alert_SubCategory_zh = "異常身分權限修改",
    Alert_Name_zh = "特權帳戶的驗證方法已更改",
    Alert_Description_zh =  strcat(
                            "於台灣時間:",
                            format_datetime(datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
                            ",在Entra ID : <TenantId>"
    ",使用者 : ",
                            iff(isnotempty(Initiator), Initiator, ""),
                            "在IP:",
                            IP,
                            ",進行身分驗證方法的異動"
                        ),
    Alert_TriageStep_zh = strcat(
                          "1.驗證方法是否有成功的紀錄出現。"
    "2.與使用者:",
                          iff(isnotempty(Initiator), Initiator, ""),
                          "確認是否有進行變更的動作。"
                      ),
    Alert_Containment_zh = strcat(
                           "1.立即撤銷該帳號所有現有登入權杖與工作階段(Sign-in session / refresh token) 並強制重設密碼與 MFA。 ",
                           "2.立即停用該帳號。"
                       ),
    Alert_Remediation_zh = strcat(
                           "1.針對 Admin / VIP 帳號強化安全性資訊治理,要求安全性資訊異動必須經過額外驗證或人工審核。",
                           "2.強制高權限帳號套用進階條件式存取策略:包含 MFA/合規裝置,風險型登入政策,並阻擋來自未知地點或新裝置的異動行為。 ",
                           "3.建立並優化安全性資訊異動的即時告警與自動化回應SOAR 例如自動封鎖帳號/通知 SOC 要求使用者確認。 "
                       ),
            Alert_Time_TW = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"),
    Alert_Time_UTC0 = TimeGenerated,
    Event_Action = Actions,
    Event_Status = Result,
    //Event_Description = ActivityDisplayName,
    Source_Identity_FullName = Initiator,
    //Source_Identity_ID = ActorID,
    Source_Identity_Type = iff(isnotempty(Initiator), "User", "Service"),
    Source_Network_IPAddress = GeoInfo,
    Source_Network_IPLocation = Source_Network_IPLocation,
    Source_Resource_Name = InitiatingAppServicePrincipalName,
    Target_Identity_FullName = Targets,
    Target_Identity_Type = "User",
    Target_Resource_ID = tostring(coalesce(AADTenantId, TenantId)),
    Target_Resource_Type = "Entra ID"

properties.description: [Entra ID]偵測到大量特權角色變更動作_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0

偵測同時一次變更多個使用者的權限。
遏制措施
1.Portal：Entra ID → Roles & admins → <被加入的 Admin 角色> → Members
2.點右上 Bulk remove → 上傳 CSV（把剛複製的使用者清單貼進模板）→ Submit，若只有少數帳號，也可逐一勾選後 Remove。
3.封鎖「變更人 / 變更 App」Users → <InitiatedByUser> → Block sign-in = Yes → Save 或者Enterprise apps → <Initiating App> → Properties → Enabled for users to sign-in? = No → Save
4.撤銷目前權杖 同一使用者頁面點 Revoke sessions → Yes
5.封鎖來源位址 Entra ID → Conditional Access → Named locations → + New → 輸入 IP/CIDR → Block → Save。
properties.displayName: [Entra ID] 偵測到大量特權角色變更動作
properties.query:
AuditLogs
| where Category =~ "RoleManagement"
| where ActivityDisplayName has_any ("Add eligible member to role", "Add member to role")
| mv-expand TargetResources
| mv-expand TargetResources.modifiedProperties
| extend displayName_ = tostring(TargetResources_modifiedProperties.displayName)
| extend RoleName = tostring(parse_json(tostring(TargetResources_modifiedProperties.newValue)))
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalName)
| where RoleName contains "Admin"
| extend Target = tostring(TargetResources.userPrincipalName)
| summarize dcount(Target) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where dcount_Target >= 9
| join kind=rightsemi  (AuditLogs
    | where Category =~ "RoleManagement"
    | where ActivityDisplayName has_any ("Add eligible member to role", "Add member to role")
    | mv-expand TargetResources
    | mv-expand TargetResources.modifiedProperties
    | extend displayName_ = tostring(TargetResources_modifiedProperties.displayName)
    | where displayName_ =~ "Role.DisplayName"
    | extend RoleName = tostring(parse_json(tostring(TargetResources_modifiedProperties.newValue)))
    | extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalId)
    | extend Source_UserPrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
    | extend InitiatingAppName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
    | where RoleName contains "Admin"
    | extend Target = tostring(TargetResources.userPrincipalName)
    | extend InitiatingIpAddress = tostring(iff(isnotempty(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress), InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress, InitiatedBy.app.ipAddress))
    | extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(InitiatingIpAddress) // <-- Added this line to get Geo Info
    | extend Source_Network_IPLocation = tostring(GeoInfo.country)    // <-- Added this line to extract Country
    | extend TimeWindow = bin(TimeGenerated, 1h))
    on $left.TimeGenerated == $right.TimeWindow
| project
        Alert_Category_zh = "Entra ID",
    Alert_SubCategory_zh = "異常身分權限修改",
    Alert_Name_zh = "偵測到大量特權角色變更動作",
    Alert_Description_zh =  strcat(
                            "於台灣時間:",
                            format_datetime(datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
                            ",在Entra ID : <TenantId>"
    ",使用者 : ",
                            iff(isnotempty(Source_UserPrincipalName), Source_UserPrincipalName, InitiatingAppName),
                            "在IP:",
                            InitiatingIpAddress,
                            ",進行大量的權限變更,新增角色權限為:",
                            RoleName
                        ),
    Alert_TriageStep_zh=
    strcat(
    "1. 確認指派高權限角色 ",
    iff(isnotempty(RoleName), RoleName, "<NoRole>"),
    " 是否有對應的變更申請或核准紀錄。",
    "2. 驗證目標帳號 ",
    iff(isnotempty(Target), Target, "<NoTargetUser>"),
    " 是否為實際需要該管理權限的使用者。",
    "3. 檢查來源 IP ",
    iff(isnotempty(InitiatingIpAddress), InitiatingIpAddress, "<NoIP>"),
    " 與登入位置 ",
    iff(isnotempty(Source_Network_IPLocation), Source_Network_IPLocation, "<NoLocation>"),
    " 是否為公司IP及的常用位置。"
),
    Alert_Containment_zh = strcat(
                           "1. 立即檢視並暫停所有於事件時間窗內新增的 Admin 角色成員,確認是否為核准的權限異動,未授權者立即移除角色。",
                           "2. 立即限制或停用執行角色指派的來源帳號或應用程式(",
                           iff(isnotempty(InitiatingAppName), InitiatingAppName, "<NoInitiator>"),
                           ")，並撤銷其現有登入權杖與工作階段。 ",
                           "3. 若來源為 Service Principal,立即停用該應用程式,撤銷憑證/密鑰與 Graph API 權限,防止持續自動化濫用。 "
                       ),
    Alert_Remediation_zh = strcat(
                           "1. 強化 Admin 角色指派治理:僅允許透過 PIM 進行 Just-In-Time 存取，並要求核准與存取理由,禁止永久指派。 ",
                           "2. 建立角色異動的即時告警與自動化回應(SOAR),包含大量指派,非上班時間或異常地理位置行為。",
                           "3. 定期稽核 Admin 角色成員/Service Principal 權限與 API 同意,移除不必要或長期未使用的高權限存取。 "
                       ),
            Alert_Time_TW = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"),
    Alert_Time_UTC0 = TimeGenerated,
    Event_Action = ActivityDisplayName,
    Event_Status = Result,
    //Event_Description = ActivityDisplayName,
    Source_Identity_FullName = iff(isnotempty(Source_UserPrincipalName), Source_UserPrincipalName, InitiatingAppName),
    //Source_Identity_ID = ActorID,
    Source_Identity_Type = iff(isnotempty(Source_UserPrincipalName), "User", "Service"),
    Source_Network_IPAddress = InitiatingIpAddress,
    Source_Network_IPLocation = GeoInfo,
    //Source_Resource_Name = InitiatingAppName,
    Target_Identity_FullName = Target,
    Target_Identity_DomainType = iff(Target contains "EXT", 'External', 'Internal'),
    Target_Identity_Type = "User",
    Target_Resource_ID =  AADTenantId,
    Target_Resource_Type = "Entra ID"

properties.description: eDCRule Analytics Rule 16

properties.displayName: [Entra ID] 偵測到大量特權角色變更動作

properties.description: [Entra ID]授予應用程式可指派Microsoft Entra ID 角色的管理權限_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0

授予應用程式可指派Microsoft Entra ID 角色的管理權限。
請與Entra ID的管理員確認，是否允許該應用程式可以指派角色權限， 若非預期建議請至Entra ID->應用程式註冊->所有應用程式->找到該應用程式選擇API permissions，將權限移除，再調查是否有其他活動。
properties.displayName: [Entra ID]授予應用程式可指派Microsoft Entra ID 角色的管理權限
properties.query:
AuditLogs
| where Category =~ "ApplicationManagement"
    and LoggedByService =~ "Core Directory"
    and OperationName in~ ("Add delegated permission grant", "Add app role assignment to service principal")
| mv-apply TargetResource = TargetResources on
    (
    where TargetResource.type =~ "ServicePrincipal"
        and array_length(TargetResource.modifiedProperties) > 0
        and isnotnull(TargetResource.displayName)
    | extend props = TargetResource.modifiedProperties
    )
| mv-apply Property = props on
    (
    where Property.displayName in~ ("AppRole.Value", "DelegatedPermissionGrant.Scope")
    | extend
        DisplayName = tostring(Property.displayName),
        PermissionGrant = trim('"', tostring(Property.newValue))
    )
| where PermissionGrant has "RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory"
| mv-apply Property = props on
    (
    where Property.displayName =~ "ServicePrincipal.DisplayName"
    | extend TargetAppDisplayName = trim('"', tostring(Property.newValue))
    )
| mv-apply Property = props on
    (
    where Property.displayName =~ "ServicePrincipal.ObjectID"
    | extend TargetAppServicePrincipalId = trim('"', tostring(Property.newValue))
    )
| extend InitiatingAppName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalId)
| extend InitiatingUserPrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatingAadUserId = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
| extend InitiatingIpAddress = tostring(iff(isnotempty(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress), InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress, InitiatedBy.app.ipAddress))
| extend TargetAppDisplayName = tostring(iff(isnotempty(TargetAppDisplayName), TargetAppDisplayName, TargetAppServicePrincipalId))
| extend
    InitiatingAccountName = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName, "@")[0]),
    InitiatingAccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName, "@")[1])
| extend Initiator = InitiatingAccountName, Target = TargetAppDisplayName
| extend
    Source_Network_IPLocation= geo_info_from_ip_address(InitiatingIpAddress)
| project
        Alert_Category_zh = "Entra ID",
    Alert_SubCategory_zh = "異常身分權限修改",
    Alert_Name_zh = "授予應用程式可指派Microsoft Entra ID 角色的管理權限",
    Alert_Description_zh = strcat("於台灣時間", format_datetime(datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"), ". ", "EntraID:", tostring(coalesce(AADTenantId, TenantId)), ". ", "偵測到來源使用者/服務主體", iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUserPrincipalName), InitiatingUserPrincipalName, InitiatingAppName), "授予應用程式:", TargetAppDisplayName, ".", "可指派Microsoft Entra ID 角色的管理權限:", ActivityDisplayName, ". 來源IP:", InitiatingIpAddress, ", 來源位置:", Source_Network_IPLocation),
    Alert_TriageStep_zh = strcat(
                          "1. 確認操作使用者/服務主體:",
                          iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUserPrincipalName), InitiatingUserPrincipalName, InitiatingAppName),
                          ", 來源 IP:",
                          InitiatingIpAddress,
                          "是否異常。 ",
                          "2. 檢視授權目標應用",
                          TargetAppDisplayName,
                          " 授權內容:",
                          ActivityDisplayName,
                          "是否為預期操作或維運項目。"
                      ),
    Alert_Containment_zh = strcat(
                           "1. 若判定為未授權或可疑權限升級, 立即移除目標應用程式:",
                           TargetAppDisplayName,
                           "的權限並停用 。",
                           "2. 針對操作發起者 ",
                           iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUserPrincipalName), InitiatingUserPrincipalName, InitiatingAppName),
                           " 進行風險處置(撤銷 Sessions/強制重新身分驗證, 必要時暫停其目錄管理權限)。"
                       ),
    Alert_Remediation_zh =
    "1. 強化應用與權限治理:對高風險 Graph/Directory 權限採最小權限與管理者核准流程, 並對 Service Principal 的憑證/權限變更納入定期稽核。 "
    "2. 強化偵測與自動化:建立自動化回應(SOAR)(通知/封鎖來源/要求使用者驗證)。",
            Alert_Time_TW = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"),
    Alert_Time_UTC0 = TimeGenerated,
    Event_Action = ActivityDisplayName,
    Event_Status = Result,
    Event_Description = PermissionGrant,
    Source_Identity_FullName = iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUserPrincipalName), InitiatingUserPrincipalName, InitiatingAppName),
    Source_Identity_ID = iff(isnotempty(InitiatingAadUserId), InitiatingAadUserId, InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId),
    Source_Identity_Type = iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUserPrincipalName), "User", "Service"),
    Source_Network_IPAddress = InitiatingIpAddress,
    Source_Network_IPLocation = Source_Network_IPLocation,
    Target_Identity_FullName = TargetAppDisplayName,
    Target_Identity_ID = TargetAppServicePrincipalId,
    Target_Identity_Type = "Service",
    Target_Resource_ID = tostring(coalesce(AADTenantId, TenantId)),
    Target_Resource_Name = "Microsoft Entra ID",
    Target_Resource_Type = "Microsoft Entra ID"

properties.description: eDCRule Analytics Rule 17

properties.displayName: [Entra ID]授予應用程式可指派Microsoft Entra ID 角色的管理權限

properties.description: [Entra ID]提升權限請求已被拒絕_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0

提升權限請求已被拒絕。
請與Entra ID的管理員確認，提出請求的使用者或應用程式是否為預期，
若非預期建議與本人或應用程式擁有者確認，若無提出請求印象，
建議先重設使用者密碼、應用程式密鑰，再調查是否有其他活動。
properties.displayName: [Entra ID]提升權限請求已被拒絕
properties.query:
AuditLogs
| where ActivityDisplayName =~ 'Add member to role request denied (PIM activation)'
| mv-apply ResourceItem = TargetResources on 
    (
    where ResourceItem.type =~ "Role"
    | extend Role = trim(@'"', tostring(ResourceItem.displayName))
    )
| mv-apply ResourceItem = TargetResources on 
    (
    where ResourceItem.type =~ "User"
    | extend TargetUserPrincipalName = trim(@'"', tostring(ResourceItem.userPrincipalName))
    )
//| where ResultReason != "RoleAssignmentExists"
| where isnotempty(InitiatedBy.user)
| extend InitiatingAppName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalId)
| extend InitiatingUserPrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatingAadUserId = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
| extend InitiatingIpAddress = tostring(iff(isnotempty(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress), InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress, InitiatedBy.app.ipAddress))
| extend
    TargetName = tostring(split(TargetUserPrincipalName, '@', 0)[0]),
    TargetUPNSuffix = tostring(split(TargetUserPrincipalName, '@', 1)[0])
| extend
    InitiatedByName = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName, '@', 0)[0]),
    InitiatedByUPNSuffix = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName, '@', 1)[0])
| project-reorder
    TimeGenerated,
    TargetUserPrincipalName,
    Role,
    OperationName,
    Result,
    ResultDescription
| extend
    InitiatingUser = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend Geoinfosource = geo_info_from_ip_address(InitiatingIpAddress) // <-- Added this line to get Geo Info
| project
        Alert_Category_zh = "Entra ID",
    Alert_SubCategory_zh = "異常身分權限修改",
    Alert_Name_zh = "提升權限請求已被拒絕",
    Alert_Description_zh=strcat(
                         "於台灣時間:",
                         format_datetime(datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
                         "在Entra ID: ",
                         tostring(coalesce(AADTenantId, TenantId)),
                         "，偵測到 PIM 角色啟用失敗：目標使用者:",
                         iff(isnotempty(TargetUserPrincipalName), TargetUserPrincipalName, "<NoTargetUser>"),
                         "，目標角色:",
                         iff(isnotempty(Role), Role, "<NoRole>"),
                         "，發起者:",
                         iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUser), InitiatingUser, "<NoInitiator>"),
                         "，來源IP:",
                         iff(isnotempty(InitiatingIpAddress), InitiatingIpAddress, "<NoIP>"),
                         "，結果:",
                         iff(isnotempty(Result), Result, "<NoResult>"),
                         "（原因:",
                         iff(isnotempty(ResultDescription), ResultDescription, "<NoReason>"),
                         "）。"
                     ),
    Alert_TriageStep_zh=strcat(
                        "1. 確認啟用目標：使用者:",
                        iff(isnotempty(TargetUserPrincipalName), TargetUserPrincipalName, "<NoTargetUser>"),
                        "，角色:",
                        iff(isnotempty(Role), Role, "<NoRole>"),
                        " 是否為預期的 PIM 啟用需求。",
                        "2. 檢查失敗原因:",
                        iff(isnotempty(ResultDescription), ResultDescription, "<NoReason>"),
                        "，判斷是 MFA/條件式存取/核准流程/權限不足等原因造成。",
                        "3. 檢查來源風險：",
                        iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUser), InitiatingUser, "<NoInitiator>"),
                        "，IP:",
                        iff(isnotempty(InitiatingIpAddress), InitiatingIpAddress, "<NoIP>"),
                        " 是否為公司命名位置/VPN/跳板機，是否異常地點或非慣用來源。"
                    ),
    Alert_Containment_zh=strcat(
                         "1. 若判定為可疑嘗試，立即限制發起者:",
                         iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUser), InitiatingUser, "<NoInitiator>"),
                         " 的 PIM 啟用權限或暫停高風險角色可啟用範圍。 ",
                         "2. 立即撤銷可疑登入權杖/工作階段並強制重新驗證（發起者:",
                         iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUser), InitiatingUser, "<NoInitiator>"),
                         "），必要時重設密碼並重新註冊 MFA。 ",
                         "3. 對來源 IP:",
                         iff(isnotempty(InitiatingIpAddress), InitiatingIpAddress, "<NoIP>"),
                         " 加嚴條件式存取（僅命名位置/合規裝置/MFA），或先行封鎖以阻斷重複嘗試。 ",
                         "4. 若是核准流程/政策造成失敗，先暫停變更窗口外的啟用申請並通知管理者確認。"
                     ),
    Alert_Remediation_zh=strcat(
                         "1. 強化 PIM 治理：對高權限角色啟用要求核准與理由，並限制可啟用角色範圍（最小權限/分權管理）。 ",
                         "2. 強化條件式存取：對 PIM/管理平面強制 MFA、合規裝置與命名位置，對異常 IP/地點直接阻擋。 ",
                         "3. 建立告警與自動化回應：針對 PIM 啟用失敗設定閾值與自動化SOAR（通知、封鎖 IP、暫停帳號）。 "
                     ),
            Alert_Time_TW = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Asia/Taipei'),
    Alert_Time_UTC0 = TimeGenerated,
    Event_Action = OperationName,
    Event_Status = Result,
    Event_Description = ResultDescription,
    Source_Identity_FullName = InitiatingUser,
    Source_Identity_ID = InitiatingAadUserId,
    // Source_Identity_Name = InitiatingName,
    Source_Identity_Type = iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUser), "User", "Service"),
    Source_Network_IPAddress = InitiatingIpAddress,
    Target_Identity_FullName = TargetUserPrincipalName,
    Source_Resource_ID = InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId,
    Source_Resource_Name = InitiatingAppName,
    //Target_Identity_Name = InvitedUserName,
    Target_Identity_Type = "User",
    Target_Identity_DomainType = iff(TargetUserPrincipalName contains "EXT", 'External', 'Internal'),
    Target_Resource_ID = tostring(coalesce(AADTenantId, TenantId)),
    Target_Resource_Name = "Microsoft Entra ID",
    Target_Resource_Type = "Microsoft Entra ID"

properties.description: eDCRule Analytics Rule 18

properties.displayName: [Entra ID]提升權限請求已被拒絕

properties.description: [Entra ID]網域聯合信任設置修改_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0

當使用者或應用程式修改網域上的聯合設定或將網域身份驗證從託管更新為聯合時，將發出警報。​
例如，當在網域中新增新的 Active Directory 聯合服務 (ADFS) TrustedRealm 物件（例如簽署憑證）時，將觸發此警報。​
遏制措施：
1.在 Entra ID ▸ Users ▸ 暫時停用目標管理員帳號；若為緊急帳號（Break-glass），先改密碼並保留最小權限。
2.於使用者頁面 Revoke sessions 此動作會強制失效所有 Refresh Token
3.刪除異常 Federation 設定
‒ Set-MsolDomainAuthentication -DomainName <domain> -Authentication Managed
‒ Update-MgDomainFederationConfiguration -SigningCertificate null
properties.displayName: [Entra ID]網域聯合信任設置修改
properties.query:
(union isfuzzy=true
    (
    AuditLogs
    | where OperationName =~ "Set federation settings on domain"
    //| where Result =~ "success"   // commenting out, as it may be interesting to capture failed attempts
    | mv-expand TargetResources
    | extend modifiedProperties = parse_json(TargetResources).modifiedProperties
    | mv-expand modifiedProperties
    | extend targetDisplayName = tostring(parse_json(modifiedProperties).displayName)
    ),
    (
    AuditLogs
    | where OperationName =~ "Set domain authentication"
    //| where Result =~ "success"   // commenting out, as it may be interesting to capture failed attempts
    | mv-expand TargetResources
    | extend modifiedProperties = parse_json(TargetResources).modifiedProperties
    | mv-expand modifiedProperties
    | mv-apply Property = modifiedProperties on
        (
        where Property.displayName =~ "LiveType"
        | extend
            targetDisplayName = tostring(Property.displayName),
            NewDomainValue = tostring(Property.newValue)
        )
    | where NewDomainValue has "Federated"
    )
)
| mv-apply AdditionalDetail = AdditionalDetails on
    (
    where AdditionalDetail.key =~ "User-Agent"
    | extend UserAgent = tostring(AdditionalDetail.value)
    )
| extend InitiatingUserOrApp = iff(isnotempty(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName))
| extend InitiatingAppName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalId)
| extend InitiatingUserPrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatingAadUserId = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
| extend InitiatingIpAddress = tostring(iff(isnotempty(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress), InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress, InitiatedBy.app.ipAddress))
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
| extend
    InitiatingAccountName = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName, "@")[0]),
    InitiatingAccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName, "@")[1])
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(InitiatingIpAddress) // <-- Added this line to get Geo Info
| project 
    Alert_Time_TW = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Asia/Taipei'),
    Alert_Time_UTC0 = TimeGenerated,
        Alert_Category_zh = "Entra ID",
    Alert_SubCategory_zh = "異常設定修改",
    Alert_Name_zh = "網域聯合信任設置修改",
    Alert_Description_zh=strcat(
                         "於台灣時間:",
                         format_datetime(datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
                         "在Entra ID： ",
                         tostring(coalesce(AADTenantId, TenantId)),
                         "，偵測到 Entra ID 網域身分驗證被設定為 Federated",
                         "操作動作:",
                         iff(isnotempty(OperationName), OperationName, "<NoOperationName>"),
                         "，變更屬性:",
                         iff(isnotempty(targetDisplayName), targetDisplayName, "<NoProperty>"),
                         "，操作者/應用程式:",
                         iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUserOrApp), InitiatingUserOrApp, "<NoInitiator>"),
                         "，來源IP:",
                         iff(isnotempty(InitiatingIpAddress), InitiatingIpAddress, "<NoIP>"),
                         "，位置:",
                         iff(isnotempty(GeoInfo), GeoInfo, "<NoLocation>"),
                         "，User-Agent:",
                         iff(isnotempty(UserAgent), UserAgent, "<NoUserAgent>"),
                         "此為高風險網域層級變更，可能造成整個租戶身分被外部同盟接管。"
                     ),
    Alert_TriageStep_zh=strcat(
                        "1. 確認變更是否授權操作動作:",
                        iff(isnotempty(OperationName), OperationName, "<NoOperationName>"),
                        "，操作者:",
                        iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUserOrApp), InitiatingUserOrApp, "<NoInitiator>"),
                        " 是否有正式核准。",
                        "2. 檢查來源風險來源IP:",
                        iff(isnotempty(InitiatingIpAddress), InitiatingIpAddress, "<NoIP>"),
                        "，位置:",
                        iff(isnotempty(GeoInfo), GeoInfo, "<NoLocation>"),
                        " 是否為公司命名位置或異常國家。",
                        "3. 檢查操作工具User-Agent:",
                        iff(isnotempty(UserAgent), UserAgent, "<NoUserAgent>"),
                        " 是否為預期管理入口（Portal/PowerShell/Graph）或可疑腳本。",
                        "4. 立即盤點影響範圍：確認哪些網域被設定為 Federated，是否影響所有使用者登入流程。"
                    ),
    Alert_Containment_zh=strcat(
                         "1. 若判定為未授權變更，立即將受影響網域的身分驗證方式改回 Managed，並移除任何未授權的 Federation 設定。 ",
                         "2. 立即撤銷操作者的登入權杖與管理權限，必要時重設密碼並重新註冊 MFA。 ",
                         "3. 對來源IP進行即時封鎖或限制管理平面存取，防止持續嘗試變更。 ",
                         "4. 啟動租戶緊急應變：檢查是否已有帳號透過該 Federated 網域成功登入並執行管理操作。"
                     ),
    Alert_Remediation_zh=strcat(
                         "1. 強化網域層級治理：限制可執行 Set federation / Set domain authentication 的角色範圍，並強制雙人覆核。 ",
                         "2. 強化條件式存取：管理平面操作僅允許命名位置、合規裝置與 MFA，對異常國別或新 User-Agent 直接阻擋。 ",
                         "3. 自動化偵測與回應：針對相關事件建立 SOAR（通知、暫停帳號、封鎖來源 IP）。 ",
                         "4. 定期稽核網域與同盟設定：盤點所有網域驗證模式，移除不必要或未使用的 Federation 與信任關係。"
                     ),
            //Event_Code = AliveTime,
    Event_Action = OperationName, 
    //Event_Description = Role ,
    Event_TimeRange_Start_TW = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Asia/Taipei'),
    Event_TimeRange_End_TW = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Asia/Taipei'),
    Source_Identity_FullName = InitiatingUserOrApp,
    Source_Identity_Type = iff(isnotempty(InitiatingUserPrincipalName), "User", "Service"),
    Source_Network_IPAddress = InitiatingIpAddress,
    Source_Network_IPLocation = GeoInfo,
    Source_Identity_DomainType = iff(InitiatingUserPrincipalName contains "EXT", 'External', 'Internal'),
    Source_Resource_Name = UserAgent,
    Target_Identity_ID = targetDisplayName,
    //Target_Identity_Type = "Service",

properties.description: [Entra ID]應用程式取得角色管理權限後，隨即指派管理員權限_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0

應用程式取得角色管理權限後，隨即指派管理員權限。
請與Entra ID的管理員確認，是否允許該應用程式可以指派角色權限， 若非預期建議請至Entra ID->應用程式註冊->所有應用程式->找到該應用程式選擇API permissions，將權限移除，再調查是否有其他活動。
properties.displayName: [Entra ID]應用程式取得角色管理權限後，隨即指派管理員權限
properties.query:
let query_frequency = 1h;
let query_period = 2h;
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(query_period)
| where Category =~ "ApplicationManagement" and LoggedByService =~ "Core Directory"
| where OperationName =~ "Add app role assignment to service principal"
| mv-expand TargetResource = TargetResources
| mv-expand modifiedProperty = TargetResource["modifiedProperties"]
| where tostring(modifiedProperty["displayName"]) == "AppRole.Value"
| extend PermissionGrant = tostring(modifiedProperty["newValue"])
| where PermissionGrant has "RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory"
| mv-apply modifiedProperty = TargetResource["modifiedProperties"] on (
    summarize modifiedProperties = make_bag(
                                   bag_pack(
    tostring(modifiedProperty["displayName"]),
    bag_pack(
    "oldValue",
    trim(@'[\"\s]+', tostring(modifiedProperty["oldValue"])),
    "newValue",
    trim(@'[\"\s]+', tostring(modifiedProperty["newValue"]))
)
),
                                   100
                               )
    )
| project
    PermissionGrant_TimeGenerated = TimeGenerated,
    PermissionGrant_OperationName = OperationName,
    PermissionGrant_Result = Result,
    PermissionGrant,
    AppDisplayName = tostring(modifiedProperties["ServicePrincipal.DisplayName"]["newValue"]),
    AppServicePrincipalId = tostring(modifiedProperties["ServicePrincipal.ObjectID"]["newValue"]),
    PermissionGrant_InitiatedBy = InitiatedBy,
    PermissionGrant_TargetResources = TargetResources,
    PermissionGrant_AdditionalDetails = AdditionalDetails,
    PermissionGrant_CorrelationId = CorrelationId
| join kind=inner (
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(query_frequency)
    | where Category =~ "RoleManagement"
        and LoggedByService =~ "Core Directory"
        and AADOperationType =~ "Assign"
    | where isnotempty(InitiatedBy["app"])
    | mv-expand TargetResource = TargetResources
    | mv-expand modifiedProperty = TargetResource["modifiedProperties"]
    | where tostring(modifiedProperty["displayName"]) in ("Role.DisplayName", "RoleDefinition.DisplayName")
    | extend RoleAssignment = tostring(modifiedProperty["newValue"])
    | where RoleAssignment contains "Admin"
    | project
        RoleAssignment_TimeGenerated = TimeGenerated,
        RoleAssignment_OperationName = OperationName,
        RoleAssignment_Result = Result,
        RoleAssignment,
        TargetType = tostring(TargetResources[0]["type"]),
        Target = iff(isnotempty(TargetResources[0]["displayName"]), tostring(TargetResources[0]["displayName"]), tolower(TargetResources[0]["userPrincipalName"])),
        TargetId = tostring(TargetResources[0]["id"]),
        RoleAssignment_InitiatedBy = InitiatedBy,
        RoleAssignment_TargetResources = TargetResources,
        RoleAssignment_AdditionalDetails = AdditionalDetails,
        RoleAssignment_CorrelationId = CorrelationId,
        AppServicePrincipalId = tostring(InitiatedBy["app"]["servicePrincipalId"])
    )
    on AppServicePrincipalId
| where PermissionGrant_TimeGenerated < RoleAssignment_TimeGenerated
| extend
    TargetName = tostring(split(Target, "@")[0]),
    TargetUPNSuffix = tostring(split(Target, "@")[1])
| project
        Alert_Category_zh = "Entra ID",
    Alert_SubCategory_zh = "異常身分權限修改",
    Alert_Name_zh = "應用程式取得角色管理權限後，隨即指派管理員權限",
    Alert_Description_zh = strcat(
                           "於台灣時間",
                           format_datetime(datetime_utc_to_local(RoleAssignment_TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
                           ". ",
                           "EntraID:",
                           tostring(coalesce(AADTenantId, TenantId)),
                           ". ",
                           "偵測到發起者:",
                           tostring(PermissionGrant_InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
                           "授予應用程式:",
                           AppDisplayName,
                           "權限:",
                           PermissionGrant,
                           "之後, 應用程式隨即對目標:",
                           Target,
                           "執行角色指派:",
                           RoleAssignment
                       ),
    Alert_TriageStep_zh = strcat(
                          "1. 確認發起者:",
                          tostring(PermissionGrant_InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
                          "IP:",
                          tostring(PermissionGrant_InitiatedBy.ipAddress),
                          ", 並檢視被授權之應用程式:",
                          AppDisplayName,
                          ", 取得權限:",
                          PermissionGrant,
                          ", 是否為預期行為/自動化。 ",
                          "2. 檢視應用程式:",
                          AppDisplayName,
                          "對目標:",
                          Target,
                          "角色指派內容:",
                          RoleAssignment,
                          ", 是否為預期行為/自動化。 "
                      ),
    Alert_Containment_zh = strcat(
                           "1. 若判定為未授權行為, 立即停用發起者:",
                           tostring(PermissionGrant_InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
                           "與應用程式:",
                           AppDisplayName,
                           ", 並撤銷其 Directory/RoleManagement 相關權限。 ",
                           "2. 立即回復/移除不當的管理員角色指派:",
                           Target,
                           ", 並檢視是否有其他角色/群組/應用指派被變更。"
                       ),
    Alert_Remediation_zh =
    "1. 強化條件式存取與帳號治理:管理者帳號強制 MFA /受管理裝置與命名位置限制, 並對異常 IP 進行阻擋。 "
    "2. 落實最小權限與 PIM :管理者角色採用 Just-In-Time(JIT) 啟用並需核准, 降低帳號遭入侵後立即被濫用的風險。 "
    "3. 強化偵測與自動化:建立自動化回應 SOAR(通知/撤銷授權/停用應用/回復角色/封鎖來源)。",
            Alert_Time_TW = datetime_utc_to_local(RoleAssignment_TimeGenerated, "Asia/Taipei"),
    Alert_Time_UTC0 = RoleAssignment_TimeGenerated,
    Event_Action = RoleAssignment_OperationName,
    Event_Status = RoleAssignment_Result,
    Event_Description = strcat("發起者:", tostring(PermissionGrant_InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), "對應用程式:", AppDisplayName, ", ", PermissionGrant_OperationName, ". 隨後應用程式:", AppDisplayName, "對目標", Target, ", ", RoleAssignment_OperationName),
    Source_Identity_FullName = AppDisplayName,
    Source_Identity_ID = AppServicePrincipalId,
    Source_Identity_Type = "Service", 
    Target_Identity_FullName = Target,
    Target_Identity_ID = TargetId,
    Target_Identity_Name = TargetName,
    Target_Identity_Type = iff(TargetType has "User", "User", "Service"),
    Target_Resource_ID = tostring(coalesce(AADTenantId, TenantId)),
    Target_Resource_Name = "Microsoft Entra ID",
    Target_Resource_Type = "Microsoft Entra ID"
